name: retold-workflow
description: Reusable, product-agnostic workflow capability for Retold, built on the fable-workflow engine. A workflow service, a built-in/clone type catalog with provenance and drift detection, and a Pict UI: a map/designer on pict-section-flow, a board, subject detail (timeline, metrics, agency), and a catalog picker. It depends on injected stores, a context resolver, and an API client, so it carries no opinion about a product's data model or persistence.
author: steven velozo <steven@velozo.com>
